templates.title: NetAlertX v26
templates.name: netalertx-v26
templates.description: WIFI / LAN intruder detector. Scans for devices connected to your network and alerts you if new and unknown devices are found. WARNING: v26 has breaking changes from previous versions — volume paths changed from /app/config and /app/db to /data/config and /data/db. Existing data will NOT be migrated automatically. See the migration docs before upgrading.
